maintenanceNote: Campaigns with annual=true rotate every year by month and day. Edit this file only when Aziana wants to add, remove, or change a campaign theme.

campaigns.title: Events and Catering
campaigns.summary: Private dinners, company meals, group dinners, sushi platters and snack platters at Bobby's Marina.

campaigns.title: Sushi and Takeout
campaigns.summary: Order sushi, poke bowls, snack platters and Asian fusion favorites online for pickup.

campaigns.title: Philipsburg Visitor Stop
campaigns.summary: A waterfront stop near Bobby's Marina for visitors, boat trips and Philipsburg plans.

campaigns.title: Company Dinners and Groups
campaigns.summary: Plan year-end dinners and group meals with shared plates, sushi, seafood and Asian fusion dishes.

campaigns.title: Easy Group Dining
campaigns.summary: Shared plates, sushi combinations and relaxed marina dining for locals, families and groups.
